summary: Backend testing for Coiffure à domicile Julien Bouche - all 19 pytest tests passed (100%). Covered auth (Bearer token), settings, services CRUD with seed verification, clients CRUD, appointments with family-pack auto-detect (HOMME+FEMME+ENFANT=45€), fuel supplement tiers (0/9/10/22 km -> 0/0/2.5/5.0€), price override, update/finish/double-finish 400 errors, loyalty 5+1 reset, stock CRUD with alerts, accounting urssaf ceil(22.01*0.22=5), payment_breakdown, urssaf toggle, monthly reset, and dashboard widgets.

minor.issue: Sets cookie samesite=none + secure=true unconditionally; works only on HTTPS. Acceptable for prod via Emergent gateway. Not tested live (uses external Emergent OAuth).
No 404 returned when id doesn't exist (silently no-op). Low priority.
Accepts arbitrary keys (Dict[str,Any]) without Pydantic validation; could persist invalid fields.

Formula adds back fuel_charged after subtracting urssaf+consumables+fixed+fuel_real_cost; effectively marge = ca_brut - urssaf - consumables - fixed + fuel_balance. Confirm this is intended business logic.

action_items: Confirm marge_nette formula intention (currently adds fuel_charged back).
Consider returning 404 on PUT/DELETE for non-existent service/client/stock/appointment ids.
Tighten Pydantic models for /api/settings PUT and /api/accounting/urssaf POST.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 800+ lines - consider splitting into routers (auth, services, clients, appointments, accounting, dashboard) for maintainability.
compute_appointment_totals silently skips unknown service_ids (continue) - could mask client errors; consider raising 400.
Dashboard endpoint internally calls accounting_month(yyyymm, user) passing the auth dependency object; works but not idiomatic - extract internal helper.
month_range / accounting iteration loads all 'done' appointments to memory then filters in Python instead of querying by date range in MongoDB - will not scale.
Loyalty reset on gift sets counter to 0 even if counter was <5; spec says 5+1 - consider only resetting when prior count >= 5 (currently a gifted service of any service_id resets that counter).
test_credentials: Bearer test_session_julien (user_id test-user-julien) - seeded in MongoDB via mongosh.
seed_data_creation: Re-seeded test user + session in test_database.users and user_sessions collections (idempotent upsert).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is complete and idempotent (cleans up TEST_ data). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env or default frontend URL. Auth via header Authorization: Bearer test_session_julien.
rca of the issue: No bugs found - all critical flows pass.
